name: ginko-nuxt
description: Nuxt module for consuming Convex CMS content with preview and static build modes

scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && nuxt dev playground
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxt prepare playground
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.test: pnpm run dev:prepare && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run dev:prepare && vitest run --coverage --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:types: pnpm run dev:prepare && vue-tsc --noEmit && cd playground && vue-tsc --noEmit
